hero.body: The next generation of cat hospitality — luxury suites, smart litter box monitoring, and instant WhatsApp updates so you always know your cat is safe.

about.label: About CatSafe
about.title: We reimagined cat hospitality
about.body: CatSafe combines premium cat boarding with practical technology: sensor-equipped suites, daily care logs, live wellness indicators, and a WhatsApp-first experience for owners.
about.missionBody: To give every cat a calm, safe and intelligent stay experience that owners can trust completely.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Everything your cat needs
services.body: From smart boarding to grooming and transport — every service is designed for comfort, transparency and peace of mind.

tech.label: Smart Technology
tech.title: Years ahead of traditional pet hotels
tech.body: Our Smart Litter Box Intelligence monitors visit frequency, patterns and wellness signals, then delivers meaningful updates through WhatsApp.

booking.label: Booking Experience
booking.title: Reserve in 7 simple steps
booking.sub: Step 2 of 7 — Select check-in and check-out

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp-First
whatsapp.title: Your cat's stay, delivered to your phone
whatsapp.body: No new app required. Receive check-in confirmations, daily activity reports, smart health alerts and pickup reminders directly on WhatsApp.

cta.title: Your cat deserves the best stay.
cta.body: Smart technology. Luxury care. Complete peace of mind.

footer.desc: The next generation of cat hospitality — powered by smart technology, luxury environments, and real-time WhatsApp communication.
